name: Rolled Oat Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME - OCT/NOV 95
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugar.
2. Add water and vanilla extract; mix well.
3. Combine dry ingredients; add to the creamed mixture and mix well.
4. Chill for 30 minutes.
5. Shape into two rolls that are about 1-1/2 inches in diameter.
6. Wrap tightly in waxed paper.
7. Chill for 2 hours or until firm.
8. Cut into slices that are about 1/2 inch thick.
9. Place the slices, spaced about 2 inches apart, on greased baking sheets.
10. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
11. Remove to wire racks to cool.
Yield: about 3-1/2 dozen
